arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ
english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: حم
english translation text:
Ha, Meem.
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: وَالْكِتَابِ الْمُبِينِ
english translation text:
By the Manifest Book!
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: إِنَّا أَنزَلْنَاهُ فِي لَيْلَةٍ مُّبَارَكَةٍ ۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُنذِرِينَ
english translation text:
We sent it down on a blessed night, and We have been warning [mankind].
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: فِيهَا يُفْرَقُ كُلُّ أَمْرٍ حَكِيمٍ
english translation text:
Every definitive matter is resolved on it,
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: أَمْرًا مِّنْ عِندِنَا ۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُرْسِلِينَ
english translation text:
as an ordinance from Us. We have been sending [apostles]
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: رَحْمَةً مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۚ إِنَّهُ هُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
english translation text:
as a mercy from your Lord—indeed He is the All-hearing, the All-knowing—
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: رَبِّ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ۖ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
english translation text:
the Lord of the heavens and the earth, and whatever is between them, should you have conviction.
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ يُحْيِي وَيُمِيتُ ۖ رَبُّكُمْ وَرَبُّ آبَائِكُمُ الْأَوَّلِينَ
english translation text:
There is no god except Him: He gives life and brings death, your Lord and the Lord of your forefathers.
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: بَلْ هُمْ فِي شَكٍّ يَلْعَبُونَ
english translation text:
But they play around in doubt.
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: فَارْتَقِبْ يَوْمَ تَأْتِي السَّمَاءُ بِدُخَانٍ مُّبِينٍ
english translation text:
So watch out for the day when the sky brings on a manifest smoke,
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: يَغْشَى النَّاسَ ۖ هَٰذَا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
english translation text:
enveloping the people. [They will cry out:] ‘This is a painful punishment.
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: رَّبَّنَا اكْشِفْ عَنَّا الْعَذَابَ إِنَّا مُؤْمِنُونَ
english translation text:
Our Lord! Remove this punishment from us. Indeed we have believed!’
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: أَنَّىٰ لَهُمُ الذِّكْرَىٰ وَقَدْ جَاءَهُمْ رَسُولٌ مُّبِينٌ
english translation text:
What will the admonition avail them, when a manifest apostle had already come to them,
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: ثُمَّ تَوَلَّوْا عَنْهُ وَقَالُوا مُعَلَّمٌ مَّجْنُونٌ
english translation text:
but they turned away from him, and said, ‘A tutored madman?’
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: إِنَّا كَاشِفُو الْعَذَابِ قَلِيلًا ۚ إِنَّكُمْ عَائِدُونَ
english translation text:
Indeed We will withdraw the punishment a little; but you will revert [to your earlier ways].
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: يَوْمَ نَبْطِشُ الْبَطْشَةَ الْكُبْرَىٰ إِنَّا مُنتَقِمُونَ
english translation text:
The day We shall strike with the most terrible striking, We will indeed take vengeance [on them].
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمَ فِرْعَوْنَ وَجَاءَهُمْ رَسُولٌ كَرِيمٌ
english translation text:
Certainly We tried the people of Pharaoh before them, when a noble apostle came to them,
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: أَنْ أَدُّوا إِلَيَّ عِبَادَ اللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّي لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ
english translation text:
[saying,] ‘Give over the servants of Allah to me; indeed I am a trusted apostle [sent] to you.
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: وَأَن لَّا تَعْلُوا عَلَى اللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّي آتِيكُم بِسُلْطَانٍ مُّبِينٍ
english translation text:
Do not defy Allah. Indeed I bring you a manifest authority.
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: وَإِنِّي عُذْتُ بِرَبِّي وَرَبِّكُمْ أَن تَرْجُمُونِ
english translation text:
I seek the protection of my Lord and your Lord, lest you should stone me.
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: وَإِن لَّمْ تُؤْمِنُوا لِي فَاعْتَزِلُونِ
english translation text:
And if you do not believe me, keep out of my way.’
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُ أَنَّ هَٰؤُلَاءِ قَوْمٌ مُّجْرِمُونَ
english translation text:
Then he invoked his Lord, [saying,] ‘These are indeed a guilty lot.’
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: فَأَسْرِ بِعِبَادِي لَيْلًا إِنَّكُم مُّتَّبَعُونَ
english translation text:
[Allah told him,] ‘Set out by night with My servants; for you will be pursued.
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: وَاتْرُكِ الْبَحْرَ رَهْوًا ۖ إِنَّهُمْ جُندٌ مُّغْرَقُونَ
english translation text:
Leave behind the sea unmoving; for they will be a drowned host.’
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: كَمْ تَرَكُوا مِن جَنَّاتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
english translation text:
How many gardens and springs did they leave behind!
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: وَزُرُوعٍ وَمَقَامٍ كَرِيمٍ
english translation text:
Fields and splendid places,
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: وَنَعْمَةٍ كَانُوا فِيهَا فَاكِهِينَ
english translation text:
and the affluence wherein they rejoiced!
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: كَذَٰلِكَ ۖ وَأَوْرَثْنَاهَا قَوْمًا آخَرِينَ
english translation text:
So it was; and We bequeathed them to another people.
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: فَمَا بَكَتْ عَلَيْهِمُ السَّمَاءُ وَالْأَرْضُ وَمَا كَانُوا مُنظَرِينَ
english translation text:
So neither the sky wept for them, nor the earth; nor were they granted any respite.
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ نَجَّيْنَا بَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ مِنَ الْعَذَابِ الْمُهِينِ
english translation text:
Certainly We delivered the Children of Israel from the humiliating torment
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: مِن فِرْعَوْنَ ۚ إِنَّهُ كَانَ عَالِيًا مِّنَ الْمُسْرِفِينَ
english translation text:
of Pharaoh. Indeed, he was a tyrant among the transgressors.
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: وَلَقَدِ اخْتَرْنَاهُمْ عَلَىٰ عِلْمٍ عَلَى الْعَالَمِينَ
english translation text:
Certainly We chose them knowingly above all the nations,
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: وَآتَيْنَاهُم مِّنَ الْآيَاتِ مَا فِيهِ بَلَاءٌ مُّبِينٌ
english translation text:
and We gave them some signs in which there was a manifest test.
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: إِنَّ هَٰؤُلَاءِ لَيَقُولُونَ
english translation text:
These ones say,
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: إِنْ هِيَ إِلَّا مَوْتَتُنَا الْأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُنشَرِينَ
english translation text:
‘It will be only our first death, and we shall not be resurrected.
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: فَأْتُوا بِآبَائِنَا إِن كُنتُمْ صَادِقِينَ
english translation text:
Bring our fathers back [to life], if you are truthful.’
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: أَهُمْ خَيْرٌ أَمْ قَوْمُ تُبَّعٍ وَالَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ ۚ أَهْلَكْنَاهُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا مُجْرِمِينَ
english translation text:
Are they better, or the people of Tubba‘, and those who were before them? We destroyed them; indeed, they were guilty.
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا لَاعِبِينَ
english translation text:
We did not create the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them for play.
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: مَا خَلَقْنَاهُمَا إِلَّا بِالْحَقِّ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
english translation text:
We did not create them except with consummate wisdom; but most of them do not know.
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: إِنَّ يَوْمَ الْفَصْلِ مِيقَاتُهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
english translation text:
Indeed the Day of Judgement is the tryst for them all,
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِي مَوْلًى عَن مَّوْلًى شَيْئًا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
english translation text:
the day when a friend will not avail a friend in any way, nor will they be helped,
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: إِلَّا مَن رَّحِمَ اللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّهُ هُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الرَّحِيمُ
english translation text:
except for him on whom Allah has mercy. Indeed He is the All-mighty, the All-merciful.
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: إِنَّ شَجَرَتَ الزَّقُّومِ
english translation text:
Indeed the tree of Zaqqum
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: طَعَامُ الْأَثِيمِ
english translation text:
will be the food of the sinful.
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: كَالْمُهْلِ يَغْلِي فِي الْبُطُونِ
english translation text:
Like molten copper it will boil in their bellies,
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: كَغَلْيِ الْحَمِيمِ
english translation text:
seething like boiling water.
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: خُذُوهُ فَاعْتِلُوهُ إِلَىٰ سَوَاءِ الْجَحِيمِ
english translation text:
[The keepers of hell will be told,] ‘Seize him and drag him to the middle of hell,
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: ثُمَّ صُبُّوا فَوْقَ رَأْسِهِ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْحَمِيمِ
english translation text:
then pour over his head boiling water as punishment,
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: ذُقْ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ الْعَزِيزُ الْكَرِيمُ
english translation text:
[and tell them,] “Taste this! Indeed you are the [self-styled] mighty and noble!
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: إِنَّ هَٰذَا مَا كُنتُم بِهِ تَمْتَرُونَ
english translation text:
This is what you used to doubt!’
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: إِنَّ الْمُتَّقِينَ فِي مَقَامٍ أَمِينٍ
english translation text:
Indeed the Godwary will be in a safe place,
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: فِي جَنَّاتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
english translation text:
amid gardens and springs,
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: يَلْبَسُونَ مِن سُندُسٍ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٍ مُّتَقَابِلِينَ
english translation text:
dressed in fine silk and brocade, sitting face to face.
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: كَذَٰلِكَ وَزَوَّجْنَاهُم بِحُورٍ عِينٍ
english translation text:
So shall it be, and We shall wed them to black-eyed houris.
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: يَدْعُونَ فِيهَا بِكُلِّ فَاكِهَةٍ آمِنِينَ
english translation text:
Secure [from any kind of harm,] there they will call for every kind of fruit [they wish].
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: لَا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا الْمَوْتَ إِلَّا الْمَوْتَةَ الْأُولَىٰ ۖ وَوَقَاهُمْ عَذَابَ الْجَحِيمِ
english translation text:
Other than the first death, they will not taste death therein, and He will save them from the punishment of hell
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: فَضْلًا مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ الْفَوْزُ الْعَظِيمُ
english translation text:
—a grace from your Lord. That is the great success.
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: فَإِنَّمَا يَسَّرْنَاهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَذَكَّرُونَ
english translation text:
Indeed We have made it simple in your language, so that they may take admonition.
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke

arabic text: فَارْتَقِبْ إِنَّهُم مُّرْتَقِبُونَ
english translation text:
So wait! They [too] are waiting.
Ad Dukhan – The Smoke
